bigquery_options.description: Specifies options for BigQuery as the destination, such as creating partitioned tables, when exporting logs to BigQuery.

billing_account.description: Specifies the billing account ID where the logging sink will be created; must be in the format "billingAccounts/{billing_account_id}".

description.description: Detailed explanation of the purpose of the logging sink, its intended use, or any additional context.

destination.description: Specifies the destination for the log entries, such as a Cloud Storage bucket, BigQuery dataset, or Pub/Sub topic. Must be a valid resource URI.

disabled.description: Determines whether the logging sink is disabled; set to true to disable the sink, false to enable it.

exclusions.description: List of log exclusions that define specific log entries to be excluded from the sink; must adhere to valid exclusion filter syntax.

filter.description: Defines the criteria for matching log entries, using a logging query language expression.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the logging sink for the billing account, must be compliant with naming conventions.
